title: Computer and Information Systems Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities in such fields as electronic data processing, information systems, systems analysis, and computer programming.

tasks.text: Direct daily operations of department, analyzing workflow, establishing priorities, developing standards and setting deadlines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with department heads, managers, supervisors, vendors, and others, to solicit cooperation and resolve problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review project plans to plan and coordinate project activity.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assign and review the work of systems analysts, programmers, and other computer-related workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Provide users with technical support for computer problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop computer information resources, providing for data security and control, strategic computing, and disaster recovery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recruit, hire, train and supervise staff, or participate in staffing decisions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Stay abreast of advances in technology.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult with users, management, vendors, and technicians to assess computing needs and system requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and interpret organizational goals, policies, and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate the organization's technology use and needs and recommend improvements, such as hardware and software upgrades.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review and approve all systems charts and programs prior to their implementation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare and review operational reports or project progress reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate data processing proposals to assess project feasibility and requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage backup, security and user help systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
